images.prompt: Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: Oh no! Someone ate all the cookies from the cookie jar! There are crumbs all over the table. Who could have done it? Was it a sneaky squirrel, or maybe even a little mouse? Let's look for more clues!. Do not include any words in the cartoon.

Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: My teddy bear's favorite red button is gone! I looked under the bed, but it wasn't there. Then I saw a little sparkle on the floor right by the open toy box. Who do you think might have the button?. Do not include any words in the cartoon.

Create a cartoon with a single frame or image, describing the following: Leo put his favorite blue crayon on his desk. He went to get a drink of water. When he came back, the crayon was gone! But there was a tiny red feather sitting exactly where the crayon had been. Who do you think took Leo's blue crayon?. Do not include any words in the cartoon.
